title: Lunar Month, Vikram Samvat and Annual Calendar Contract

solar_ingress_assignment.two_ingresses: regular instance plus explicit next canonical Kshaya slot

samvat_boundary.normal_case: first Varanasi sunrise carrying Shukla Pratipada
samvat_boundary.repeated_pratipada_at_sunrise: select first sunrise date internal only
samvat_boundary.exact_boundary_equality: active post-transition value owns the equality instant

annual_book.interval: boundary civil date inclusive to next boundary civil date exclusive
annual_book.Chaitra_edge_segments: opening boundary segment and closing Krishna segment represented explicitly in one canonical reporting slot
